theorem Topology.P3_of_P2 {X : Type*} [TopologicalSpace X] {A : Set X} :
    Topology.P2 A → Topology.P3 A := by
  intro hP2
  dsimp [Topology.P2, Topology.P3] at hP2 ⊢
  intro x hxA
  have hx : x ∈ interior (closure (interior A)) := hP2 hxA
  have hsubset : closure (interior A) ⊆ closure A := by
    have h_inner : interior A ⊆ A := Set.interior_subset
    exact Set.closure_mono h_inner
  have hmono : interior (closure (interior A)) ⊆ interior (closure A) :=
    Set.interior_mono hsubset
  exact hmono hx

theorem P2_implies_P1 {X : Type*} [TopologicalSpace X] {A : Set X}
    (h : Topology.P2 (X := X) A) : Topology.P1 (X := X) A := by
  dsimp [Topology.P2, Topology.P1] at *
  exact h.trans interior_subset
